summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ConnectJob production configuration features (iteration 4). All new features working correctly: /api/config/status endpoint returns 6 services with correct statuses, Admin page shows Production Config Panel with expand/collapse functionality, Escrow page shows Stripe demo badge. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All tested features working.

minor.issue: Rate limiter (20 req/15min) triggered during automated testing - expected behavior, not a bug
payee_id is marked optional in validator but required in MongoDB model - inconsistency (tests work when payee_id provided)

issues: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop - minor console warning

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns ok status with database connected
GET /api/config/status returns all 6 services with correct statuses
Login with admin credentials (andrei.georgescu@test.com) - role: admin verified
Config panel expand/collapse toggle button works
Config panel shows all 6 services with data-testid attributes
Escrow page shows 'Mod Demo — Stripe neconfigurat' badge
Escrow page loads with job details and payment flow
critical_code_review_comments: Production Config Panel implementation is clean and well-structured
All 6 services correctly detected and displayed with appropriate status colors
VAPID keys properly configured (real keys generated with web-push)
JWT secret is 64 bytes hex - secure configuration
Minor: payee_id validator says optional but model requires it - should align
Minor: React key warning in MapPage - should add unique keys to list items
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production config features fully tested and working. Rate limiter may trigger during heavy automated testing - restart backend to reset. Stripe payments in SIMULATED mode (no real STRIPE_SECRET_KEY). Email notifications console-only. All 6 services in config/status endpoint verified: database(active), stripe(simulated), email(inactive), cloudinary(local), push_notifications(active), jwt(secure).

mocked_apis.Stripe Escrow: SIMULATED - payments created with sim_ prefix when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not set
mocked_apis.Email notifications: Console log only - no actual emails sent

features_tested.config_status_endpoint: PASS - returns all 6 services with correct statuses
features_tested.health_endpoint: PASS - returns ok with database connected
features_tested.production_config_panel: PASS - shows in Admin page with expand/collapse
features_tested.config_panel_services: PASS - all 6 services displayed with correct indicators
features_tested.escrow_payment_flow: PASS - create/release/dispute work in simulated mode
features_tested.navigation: PASS - verified in previous tests (rate limiter blocked final nav test)
